<!-- Generated by StrongAIAutoDoc 20260524 -->

GuardDog is a Node/TypeScript tool that performs automated architecture reviews on a target repository. Users invoke a CLI that dispatches to `init` (scaffolding a `.guarddog/` workspace) or `review` (running the end-to-end review workflow). The review pipeline scans and summarizes the repo, selects a bounded set of high-value context files within token budgets, builds prompt parameters, and calls an LLM through a small provider abstraction. The resulting structured findings are validated against shared schemas, filtered by configured thresholds, and rendered as a Markdown report (optionally with JSON/debug artifacts). Findings can also be published as GitHub issues.

```mermaid
C4Component
title GuardDog (Package Root) - Rolled-up Component Diagram

Person(user, "User", "Runs guarddog from a terminal/CI")

System_Ext(repo, "Target Repository", "Filesystem", "Codebase being initialized/reviewed")
System_Ext(llmApis, "LLM Provider APIs", "External Service", "Model endpoints for review and ranking")
System_Ext(githubApi, "GitHub REST API", "External Service", "Issues API for publishing findings")

Container_Boundary(guarddog, "GuardDog Package") {

  Component(cli, "cli/", "CLI Entry & Dispatch", "Parses argv, prints help, dispatches subcommands, enforces exit codes")
  Component(cliCommands, "cli/commands/", "CLI Commands", "Implements init/review command workflows and publishing options")

  Component(core, "core/", "Review Pipeline", "Scans repo, selects context, builds prompts, calls LLM, validates/filters, renders reports")

  Component(github, "github/", "GitHub Publishing", "Renders issue drafts and creates issues (dry-run or real)")

  Component(schemas, "schemas/", "Shared Schemas & Defaults", "Config, findings/result contracts, repo map, context rank/manifest schemas")
  Component(utils, "utils/", "Utilities", "Errors, filesystem helpers, logging, token counting")

  Component(promptIds, "PromptIds.ts", "Prompt Identifiers", "Stable UUIDs for architecture review and context ranking prompts")
}

Rel(user, cli, "Invokes", "terminal/CI")
Rel(cli, cliCommands, "Dispatches to", "init | review")

Rel(cliCommands, core, "Runs", "review workflow")
Rel(cliCommands, github, "Optionally publishes via", "create issues")
Rel(cliCommands, schemas, "Uses", "config + finding/result types")
Rel(cliCommands, utils, "Uses", "logger/errors/fs helpers")

Rel(core, schemas, "Validates against", "schemas/contracts")
Rel(core, utils, "Uses", "repo scanning, token counting, logging, errors")
Rel(core, promptIds, "Selects prompts by", "UUID constants")
Rel(core, repo, "Reads", "scan + context files")
Rel(core, llmApis, "Calls", "review + context ranking")

Rel(github, schemas, "Consumes", "review results/findings")
Rel(github, utils, "Uses", "logger/errors")
Rel(github, githubApi, "Creates issues via", "HTTPS")
Rel(cliCommands, repo, "Reads/Writes", ".guarddog/* outputs")
```

Key components include the **CLI (`cli/`)**, which provides a stable user interface with consistent validation, error rendering, and explicit exit codes. **CLI Commands (`cli/commands/`)** implement `init` (scaffolding `.guarddog/` config, reviewer guidance, and schemas) and `review` (argument parsing, config loading, running the pipeline, summarizing results, and optionally publishing issues). The **Core pipeline (`core/`)** orchestrates repository scanning, C4-aware context ranking/selection with token budgeting, prompt construction, LLM invocation, strict parsing/validation of structured output, filtering by severity/impact thresholds, and Markdown report rendering. **Schemas (`schemas/`)** define the contracts that keep configuration, repo maps, context ranking, and findings interoperable across the CLI, core, and GitHub publishing. **GitHub (`github/`)** turns results into issue drafts and pushes them via the GitHub API. **Utilities (`utils/`)** supply shared errors, filesystem safety, logging, and token counting. **PromptIds.ts** centralizes prompt UUIDs used by the LLM calls.
